Compliance.description: CMS registered #1125, strong solvency >30%, no major recent penalties (past prepaid issue 2020). CMS overseeing 2026 pharmacy recovery.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.25/5 (1,514 recent reviews, 90% 1-star), mixed Reddit. Backlash on pharmacy error recoveries.

Product Value.description: 25 plans R1,278-R12,338/mo, 2026 increases 0-7.9% deferred Apr, strong hospital/chronic value in-network.

Innovation.description: AI Personal Health Pathways/fund (up to R12k), virtual GP, symptom checker, Smart Saver plans.

Customer Support.description: 0860 lines, app claims, 100% HelloPeter response (avg 13h), but complaints on delays/rudeness.

Accessibility & Security.description: Modern app with digital claims, POPIA-compliant manual published, inclusive plans for families. No breaches noted.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: From R1,278/mo KeyCare Start Regional; Active Smart R1,350 unchanged 2026

socialSentiment.summary: Low HelloPeter (1.25/5), Reddit mixed (good majors/poor admin), news positive innovation but pharmacy backlash.
